Setting.name: approvalItems.lineBreak
Setting.label: Display approvalItem attributes with line breaks
Setting.helpText: Split comma-separated attribute values into separate lines in approval work items

Setting.name: approvalItems.hideApplication
Setting.label: Hide application rows for IdentityIQ
Setting.helpText: Hide approval items where the application is IdentityIQ. Items for other applications are unaffected.

Setting.name: approvalItems.hideNativeIdentity
Setting.label: Hide native identity column
Setting.helpText: Hide the native identity column in approval item grids

Setting.name: approvalItems.changeHighlight
Setting.label: Highlight changes by operation type
Setting.helpText: Color-code approval item rows based on operation (Create=green, Modify=blue, Delete=red)

Form.name: IIQ UI Toolkit Settings
Form.Description: Configure approval work item UI enhancements

Field.name: approvalItems.lineBreak
Field.displayName: Display approvalItem attributes with line breaks
Field.helpKey: Split comma-separated attribute values into separate lines in approval work items

Field.name: approvalItems.hideApplication
Field.helpKey: Hide approval items where the application is IdentityIQ. Items for other applications are unaffected.

Field.name: approvalItems.hideNativeIdentity
Field.helpKey: Hide the native identity column in approval item grids

Field.name: approvalItems.changeHighlight
Field.helpKey: Color-code approval item rows based on operation (Create=green, Modify=blue, Delete=red)
